CustomField.formula: IF( ISNULL(Billing_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c), "Adding Students", IF( AND( ISNULL(Billing_Setting_Up_Bills_Stage_Met_Date__c), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Setting Up Bills", IF( AND( ISNULL(Billing_Submit_Verify_Stage_Met_Date__c), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Setting_Up_Bills_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Submitting Verification", IF( AND( ISNULL(Billing_Complete_Set_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Submit_Verify_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Setting_Up_Bills_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Completing Bill Set-Up", IF( AND( ISNULL(Billing_FinalVerification_Stage_Met_Date__c), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Complete_Set_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Submit_Verify_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Setting_Up_Bills_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Finalizing Verification", IF( AND( ISNULL(Billing_Adding_Payers_Stage_Met_Date__c), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_FinalVerification_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Complete_Set_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Submit_Verify_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Setting_Up_Bills_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Adding Payers", IF( AND( ISNULL(Billing_Sending_Bills_Stage_Met_Date__c), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Adding_Payers_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_FinalVerification_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Complete_Set_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Submit_Verify_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Setting_Up_Bills_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Sending Bills", IF( AND( ISNULL(Billing_Online_Payments_Stage_Met_Date__c), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Sending_Bills_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Adding_Payers_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_FinalVerification_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Complete_Set_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Submit_Verify_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Setting_Up_Bills_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Receiving Online Payments", IF( AND( NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Online_Payments_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Sending_Bills_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Adding_Payers_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_FinalVerification_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Complete_Set_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Submit_Verify_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Setting_Up_Bills_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Billing_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Activated", "Not Available" ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Calculated Billing Activation Funnel
